description: Spec references a non-existent code section; verifier correctly DISPUTED with grounded evidence that the cited section does not exist.

finding.issue: Specification cites CBC 2025 Section 1108.7 as the basis for pressure gauge accessibility requirements; CBC 2025 has no such section.

paragraph_map_slice.text: A. Comply with CBC 2025 Section 1108.7 for pressure gauge accessibility.

captured_verifier_response.explanation: CBC 2025 Chapter 11 covers accessibility but Section 1108.7 specifically does not exist in the published code. The replacement text (Chapter 11A) is also incorrect — the relevant accessibility provisions are in Chapter 11B for public buildings.

ground_truth.notes: CBC 1108.7 does not exist; the model's proposed replacement is also wrong. Manual reviewer should pick the right section.
